title: Repeated silent output truncation in public filing assistant
summary: The same filing assistant dropped the final evidence block in three separate matter drafts over two days.
problem_statement: A participant agent repeatedly produced incomplete submission drafts when the evidence section grew beyond a short summary. The issue recurred across multiple sessions and required manual operator repair before filing could continue.

provenance.notes: Observed directly during pilot submission sessions.

confidence.rationale: The operator observed the same failure pattern across repeated attempts and retained the failed drafts.

evidence.notes: Redacted session log showing missing final evidence block.
